articles.title: Remains of 3 children found in Memphis woods may have been there several years, police say - CNN
articles.description: Authorities say they are investigating the discovery of unidentified remains of three children, believed to be between 3 and 7 years of age, in Memphis that could have been there for years.

articles.title: John Phelan forced out as Navy secretary after 13 months - The Washington Post
articles.description: The billionaire was a significant contributor to President Donald Trump’s campaign, but officials said he clashed repeatedly with Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth.

articles.title: Mike Vrabel to seek counseling, won't be with Patriots for NFL draft Day 3 - ESPN
articles.description: Patriots coach Mike Vrabel won't be with the team for the third day of the NFL draft Saturday, as he plans to be with his family this weekend outside of Massachusetts.

Live Updates: Iran attacks ships in Strait of Hormuz as thousands more U.S. forces head for Middle East - CBS News
articles.description: Iran renews attacks in the Strait of Hormuz after Trump says he's extending a ceasefire indefinitely, as thousands more U.S. forces head for the region.

articles.title: Trump's redistricting war leaves Republicans worse off - Axios
articles.description: Virginia's vote pushed the House math further against the GOP.

articles.title: Enhanced Box Score: Cubs 7, Phillies 2 – April 22, 2026 - Bleacher Nation
articles.description: The Chicago Cubs are the hottest team in baseball, winning their eighth straight game on Wednesday night. The team is clicking on all cylinders, with both the pitching and the offense coming through in big moments.

articles.title: Flyers crush Penguins, 5-2, in Philly's grand welcome back to the playoffs - PhillyVoice
articles.description: The Flyers are up 3-0 over Pittsburgh. They're good again. They're worth believing in again, and Philadelphia came ready to blow the roof off the place over it.

articles.title: Senate begins "vote-a-rama" as GOP moves forward with funding ICE without Democrats - CBS News
articles.description: The Senate is beginning what's expected to be a marathon vote series on Wednesday, as Republicans move ahead with a plan to fund immigration agencies under the Department of Homeland Security without help from Democrats.

articles.title: Multicentre gene therapy for OTOF -related deafness followed up to 2.5 years - Nature

articles.title: Hungary drops veto, clearing path for $106 billion EU loan to Ukraine - CBS News
articles.description: The move may signal a more constructive relationship between Ukraine and the European Union following the ouster of Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán earlier this month.

articles.title: N.J. reports first measles case of 2026. Resident may have exposed others at 2 locations. - NJ.com
articles.description: Measles is highly contagious and can remain in the air for up to two hours after an infected person leaves the area.
